title: calea berteroana
intro: Calea berteroana, also known as Mexican Dream Herb, is a plant species native to Mexico and Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to induce lucid dreaming, reduce anxiety, and promote relaxation. The plant is rich in flavonoids, alkaloids, and other compounds that contribute to its health benefits, such as improving sleep quality, reducing stress, and enhancing cognitive function. Calea berteroana is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to promote a restful and rejuvenating sleep.
